recent_bad_license_projects.name: PyByntic
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: PyByntic extends Pydantic with binary-typed fields and automatic byte-level serialization. Define models using familiar Pydantic syntax and turn them into compact binary payloads with full control over layout and numeric precision.
